meta.name: viewport
meta.title: AI Trend Radar | Ultimate Creator Toolkit

meta.name: description
meta.content: The all-in-one AI suite for content creators. Find trends, generate scripts, and grow your channel.

div.class: bg-gradient-blob bg-emerald-500 w-[500px] h-[500px] rounded-full top-[-100px] left-[-100px] animate-blob
bg-gradient-blob bg-indigo-500 w-[400px] h-[400px] rounded-full top-[20%] right-[-50px] animate-blob animation-delay-2000
bg-gradient-blob bg-rose-500 w-[600px] h-[600px] rounded-full bottom-[-200px] left-[20%] animate-blob animation-delay-4000

nav.class: w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-6 flex justify-between items-center relative z-20

div.class: flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer
w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-400 to-cyan-500 flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg shadow-emerald-500/30

a.class: hidden md:flex text-sm font-medium text-slate-300 hover:text-white transition-colors items-center gap-2 bg-slate-800/50 px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-slate-700/50 hover:bg-slate-700

main.class: flex-grow w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 pt-12 pb-24 relative z-10

div.class: text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-16 animate-fade-in-up
inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-slate-800/80 border border-slate-700 mb-6 backdrop-blur-md

span.class: animate-ping absolute inline-flex h-full w-full rounded-full bg-emerald-400 opacity-75
relative inline-flex rounded-full h-2 w-2 bg-emerald-500

h1.class: font-heading text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-extrabold tracking-tight mb-6 leading-tight

div.h1:
The Ultimate Suite For
Content Creators.

p.class: text-lg md:text-xl text-slate-400 mb-8 max-w-2xl mx-auto

div.p: Generate viral ideas, analyze trends, write faceless scripts, and design high-CTR thumbnails—all powered by advanced AI algorithms.

div.class: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6

a.class: tool-card rounded-3xl p-6 group block animate-fade-in-up

div.class: tool-content flex flex-col h-full
w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-emerald-500/10 border border-emerald-500/20 flex items-center justify-center mb-5 group-hover:bg-emerald-500/20 transition-colors

div.p: Scan any niche to find viral content opportunities and analyze growth velocity.

div.class: text-emerald-400 text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-1 group-hover:gap-2 transition-all

a.class: tool-card rounded-3xl p-6 group block animate-fade-in-up

div.class: tool-content flex flex-col h-full
flex justify-between items-start mb-5
w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/20 flex items-center justify-center group-hover:bg-red-500/20 transition-colors

span.class: px-2 py-1 bg-red-500/20 text-red-400 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase rounded-md border border-red-500/20 animate-pulse

div.p: A real-time dashboard of the hottest, fastest-growing niches on YouTube.

div.class: text-red-400 text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-1 group-hover:gap-2 transition-all

a.class: tool-card rounded-3xl p-6 group block md:col-span-2 animate-fade-in-up

div.class: tool-content flex flex-col h-full bg-[url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,')] bg-no-repeat bg-right-bottom
flex justify-between items-start mb-5
w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-indigo-500/10 border border-indigo-500/20 flex items-center justify-center group-hover:bg-indigo-500/20 transition-colors

span.class: px-2 py-1 bg-indigo-500/20 text-indigo-300 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase rounded-md border border-indigo-500/20

div.p: Our most advanced tool. Instantly generate a complete, highly-engaging visual storyboard, voiceover script, and B-roll prompts for faceless YouTube channels.

div.class: mt-auto text-indigo-400 text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-1 group-hover:gap-2 transition-all

a.class: tool-card rounded-3xl p-6 group block animate-fade-in-up

div.class: tool-content flex flex-col h-full
w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-orange-500/10 border border-orange-500/20 flex items-center justify-center mb-5 group-hover:bg-orange-500/20 transition-colors

div.p: Generate highly clickable, proven video concepts tailored perfectly to your specific niche.

div.class: text-orange-400 text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-1 group-hover:gap-2 transition-all

a.class: tool-card rounded-3xl p-6 group block animate-fade-in-up

div.class: tool-content flex flex-col h-full
w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-rose-500/10 border border-rose-500/20 flex items-center justify-center mb-5 group-hover:bg-rose-500/20 transition-colors

div.p: Design high-CTR, big bold text concepts mathematically optimized for YouTube thumbnails.

div.class: text-rose-400 text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-1 group-hover:gap-2 transition-all

a.class: tool-card rounded-3xl p-6 group block animate-fade-in-up

div.class: tool-content flex flex-col h-full
w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-purple-500/10 border border-purple-500/20 flex items-center justify-center mb-5 group-hover:bg-purple-500/20 transition-colors

div.p: Build engaging outlines, killer 3-second hooks, and full video structures effortlessly.

div.class: text-purple-400 text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-1 group-hover:gap-2 transition-all

a.class: tool-card rounded-3xl p-6 group block animate-fade-in-up

div.class: tool-content flex flex-col h-full
w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-cyan-500/10 border border-cyan-500/20 flex items-center justify-center mb-5 group-hover:bg-cyan-500/20 transition-colors

div.p: Generate hyper-optimized, curiosity-driven titles that make people click instantly.

div.class: text-cyan-400 text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-1 group-hover:gap-2 transition-all

a.class: tool-card rounded-3xl p-6 group block animate-fade-in-up

div.class: tool-content flex flex-col h-full
w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-yellow-500/10 border border-yellow-500/20 flex items-center justify-center mb-5 group-hover:bg-yellow-500/20 transition-colors

div.p: Analyze your idea's true potential. Get a mathematical virality score before you hit record.

div.class: text-yellow-400 text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-1 group-hover:gap-2 transition-all

footer.class: w-full text-center py-8 text-slate-500 text-sm relative z-10 border-t border-slate-800/60 mt-auto
footer.p: © 2026 AI Trend Radar Suite. Crafted for next-generation creators.
